description_long: This object is a classic, large, rectangular mobile phone reminiscent of early cellular devices from the 1980s and 1990s. It features a prominent, extendable antenna on one end, a numeric keypad with physical buttons, and a small monochrome display screen above the keypad. The casing is primarily black plastic with a matte finish, and the buttons are light-colored with visible numbers and symbols. The device is bulky compared to modern phones, with a thick body and a pronounced, utilitarian design. The brand name and some labeling are visible above the keypad, adding to its retro appearance.
description: A bulky, retro mobile phone with a long antenna, physical keypad, and small display, encased in black plastic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the keypad, display, and brand label, with the antenna extending from the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the phone's thickness, the length of the antenna, and the profile of the keypad.
description_view_2: Rear view with the antenna fully extended and the back of the phone visible, minimal detail on the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the phone's thickness and the extended antenna, with the keypad partially visible.
